review_title: Must have software for planning and project control managers
description: We are able to provide competitive pricing for our delay analysis contracts due to the fact that we can analyze all project schedules in minutes for quality and also to understand at a high level which activities are driving delay and if the Contractor has been mitigating or accelerating to recover delay
author: Tony H.
pros: The dashboards and delay analysis capability is great to be able to see what is driving delays to a project in minutes
cons: The platform is updated regularly and with the suggestion box on the platform the Smartpm team are always open to ideas to improve the software

author: Ben R.
pros: This tool runs a number of reports and analysis that can free up the team to use the data rather than dedicating their time to generating the data. These features allow key project reports to be generated quickly after update windows, allowing project teams to quickly review and act on the data.
cons: The program is still in development, which leaves some important features still 'in the que' for future development. The support team is eager for these suggestions, and happy to try to find ways to overcome any current obstacles.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great for handling multiple Projects with complete transparency
description: [sensitive content hidden] is an amazing rep that is capable to answer any questions and comments or knows where to go to find the answers. She is going above and beyond.
author: Andreas S.
pros: Automatic analysis of so many different KPI's
cons: It takes a while to get to know how to operate the system
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall. it's a great product, clear analysis, fast reporting, easy to customize.
author: Raul A.
pros: Fast in responding specific needs. Good leaners of Construction needs
cons: GRANT Chart. Not very dynamic, need improve on the view.

author: Chris M.
pros: SmartPM allows us to visualize the vast amounts of schedule data generated. We can easily spot schedule issues much earlier that just looking at a Gantt Chart.
cons: Some of the terminology used is confusing such as "Backdated Activities" "Should Start Should Finish"

description: As I have been using MS Project for more than 30 years, smartPM opened my eyes for new things and methods to improve my scheduling capabilities, and also showed my better and easier ways to keep them updated. We are in the right direction to have a better control of our Projects that assures the compliance with every Contractual End Date.
author: Jesús Z.
pros: When we started using smartPM, our construction team realized the importance of the scheduling quality to be able to manage and control their projects. They are more interested in maintaining an updated schedule and learn how to control delays.
cons: Training and follow up meetings are carried out in English, I feel that this has been the major issue for the implementation of smartPM in our company. The process has been slower than what it should.
author_profession: Head of Planning and Projects Control
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I believes the use of SmartPM has enabled us to better serve our client’s needs and remain economically competitive by allowing Project Controls & Scheduling Projects to dynamically support multiple Projects remotely (thus reducing the need for full-time on-site support). In my mind, this will only become more and more valuable over-time, as the work-from-home and hybrid work models appear to be here to stay.
author: Zach S.
pros: SmartPM has allowed me to streamline many scheduling analyses, including quality review, critical path analysis, and feasibility assessments. The number of hours that SmartPM has saved me has allowed me to dig into more robust analyses on the schedule.
cons: I've absolutely loved the software so far - I've been very impressed by the number of additional functions that have been added in the last two years, including the Should-Start, Should-Finish report. Going forward, I would be interested in having more customizability into the generation of graphics and reports.

review_title: Great Product for Complex Construction Projects
description: This product helps our organization to see how complex projects are really tracking other than if the schedule is hitting its contractual completion dates. This product identifies compression that often results from tweaking logic during the updates to achieve the completion dates. It also identifies past delays whether they are caused by the owner or third party or self-inflicted.
author: Richard G.
pros: This product complements P6 where it gives the user the ability to see how the project updates compare to each other on one screen. The graphics are very good with planned vs. actual percent complete graphs. For projects with multiple interim milestones, it is particularly helpful in tracking to each milestone throughout the course of the project.
cons: Smart PM has so many features, that it can be overwhelming in navigating through all of its features. In Smart PM's defense, they offer great online training sessions to help new and experienced users with the navigation. However, it does require some amount of effort by the users to learn from the online training and to practice what they learn.

description: Our experience has been phenomenal. The onboarding was great, and the scheduling bootcamp training with [SENSITIVE CONTENT] was second to none. The ongoing office hours for our superintendents and continued improvement of the program are fantastic.
author: Denton P.
pros: Initially the quality checker was the most appealing aspect; ability for all our superintendents to run their schedule through the quality checker and see instantly where the problem areas are. This process used to take hours clicking through each activity trying to find the problems; now they get a report with one click.
cons: Our superintendent peer group is having more trouble grasping the finer points of the project analytics and trends; we are working on training them to understand how compression and other factors equate to the reality they are experiencing on the project.

description: Working with the staff at Smart PM has been incredible. They have provided an amazing customer experience. They give us regular attention, are very responsive and seem genuinely interested in our questions and suggestions for improvement. Most notably Tenesha Kittrell-McGhee, [sensitive content hidden and [sensitive content hidden] have been fantastic to work with.
author: Brandon H.
pros: Smart PM is super easy to learn and very effective when trying to communicate what is going on in the schedule. It is so quick and easy to upload your schedules into the software and within minutes have all of the metrics at your fingertips. The Windows Analysis is a game changer. What used to take me weeks or months on some projects, now takes minutes or hours. I don't want to analyze any project without Smart PM anymore.
cons: There are a few areas where Smart PM makes assumptions and changes dates in the schedule. I would say this is what I like the least about the program. I would rather the software tell me the assumptions it would like to make, but give me the option if I want it to make the changes so I can keep the data that I import pure. I do understand that Smart PM is working on a solution to this however, so this doesn't discourage me from using the program.

review_title: SmartPM is a vital part of our businesss.
author: Sean B.
pros: The ability to complete a day-by-day delay analysis on multiple milestones in a single day is the most useful feature of the product for our company. We also use the schedule quality metrics very often to help our clients improve their schedules.
cons: I have shared my opinions with SmartPM on areas the product can be improved, and SmartPM has been really receptive and reactivated to my input.

review_title: SmartPM provides additional insight in to what is causing delays on a project
description: We are using SmartPM in multiple roles such as analyzing schedule and delays for the Owner and for presenting delays for general contractors. Also using the product to track progress on a program/portfolio set of projects. The dashboard is very useful for this.
author: Tony B.
pros: The web based, interactive graphics are very powerful and make it easy to identify when and where problems occur and provide the information to drill down in to greater detail. The company dashboards and project workspace summary pages are very well done. Very impressed with how easy it is to run a schedule quality check and to upload project updates in to the system. The implementation and training support has been excellent and has really speed up our adoption and use of the product.
cons: The Gannt chart customization features are a bit limited so we are looking forward to upcoming improvements in that area.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Smart PM is a powerful tool and it is backed by a personable, knowledgeable, and friendly customer support team to help us implement it and learn to use it to its fullest extent.
author: Emily A.
pros: My favorite tool from Smart PM is the schedule quality checker. It's very helpful to be able to identify specific activities that are currently associated with a bad scheduling practice. I'm new to using Smart PM but the analytical tools such as schedule compression and half-step delay analysis are very useful when analyzing the schedule update on a weekly basis. I can see Smart PM seamlessly folding in to our weekly schedule update routine to create more accurate and more useful schedules.
cons: My only general complaint with Smart PM is that there still seem to be some quirks as far as user-friendliness goes. However, I think all of these issues will be fixed in the short term and since we have started to use Smart PM all of our questions/concerns have been addressed quickly by customer support.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Matthew V.
pros: I like how easy it is to use and the reports that SmartPM creates. With the reports and feedback from SmartPM, I can go back to our Project teams and work with them to improve the schedule, if needed.
cons: I don't have any really big cons. The few items that I did have a problem with early on were fixed by the SmartPM team.

author: Sara M.
pros: The ease of the program and the astounding comparisons/forensics it can do is truly amazing. [SENSITIVE CONTENT] and is team have worked tirelessly to accommodate the program in the way we need it to work. [SENSITIVE CONTENT] has been a true asset in getting our team ready for the use of the program.
cons: The fact that I cant compare two schedules with the same data date. I understand why, but it unfortunately limits the capacity I can use the program for one particular project.

review_title: SmartPM, an amazing tool for schedule analysis
description: I used SmartPM to communicate in an easy-to-understand method my client's schedules progress, concerns, and observations. 0
author: Larry M.
pros: I had a 2 year experience using SmartPM. I not only got a great tool to work with, but I got a great education on how a P6 schedule can really be used as a tool to manage a project. If I get another similar assignment, I be right back using SmartPM again.

description: The SmartPM team made setting up and implementing this platform so easy. [sensitive content hidden] are the all-star team. They are very responsive and helpful. If you get them during your trial period, you are in great hands.
author: Kaitlynn K.
pros: - SmartPM can take data from the schedule and makes it easier to digest - The graphs and tables allow us to get a better understanding of what is happening and is a great way to start conversations on near critical and critical tasks. - The modeling feature is a game changer. You can create scenarios that you want to look at, and it will show the outcome without changing the actual schedule document.
cons: - Would love to see the suggestions get implemented, or a message saying that it was received, and they are working on it or have decided not to move forward with it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Andy M.
pros: SmartPM isn't just another scheduling software; it's a game-changer. Its intuitive interface makes creating and managing schedules a breeze. Whether you're a novice or a seasoned pro, SmartPM adapts to your expertise level, ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. One of the standout features of SmartPM is its robust scheduling engine. With advanced algorithms at its core, SmartPM optimizes schedules for maximum efficiency, taking into account various constraints and dependencies. This means fewer delays, better resource utilization, and ultimately, happier stakeholders. But SmartPM doesn't stop there. Its collaborative capabilities are second to none. Team members can easily collaborate in real-time, share updates, and communicate. SmartPM keeps everyone on the same page, every step of the way. As someone who values data-driven decision-making, I appreciate SmartPM's analytics and reporting tools. With customizable dashboards and insightful reports, I can easily track progress, identify bottlenecks, and make informed decisions to keep projects on track. This has improved our overall health of the schedules on every project we currently have.
cons: We use columns within Microsoft Projects to identify levels, towers, and buildings. Being able to see those within the software would be really helpful.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My colleagues at Satterfield & Pontikes and I find SmartPM to be an invaluable tool, enabling us to proactively identify key drivers at earlier stages than previously achievable. Its efficacy as a risk mitigation tool has been substantiated through practical application.
author: Seth J.
pros: What I liked most about SmartPM was its ability to streamline project management processes with intuitive features which has empowered efficient decision-making and facilitated successful project outcomes.
cons: One drawback I encountered with SmartPM pertains to the accuracy of its SPI calculation, particularly when the planned percentage completion reaches 100%. Additionally, the frequent appearance of pop-up notifications, disrupting discussions, detracts from the platform's usability. Lastly, the Gantt chart interface could benefit from refinement to match the user-friendly experience offered by Primavera's Gantt display.

description: My experience with the SmartPM application and the SmartPM support personnel has been outstanding.
author: Jim C.
pros: The quantity and quality of the analytical data provides a deep insight into the schedule status. It is very useful to be able to export schedule quality and change data to an Excel format. The reporting functions are great and continue to be improved.
cons: There are times when the analysis of the uploaded schedules takes longer than expected. The application runs through a web browser. Clicking the various links opens additional windows in the browser. After several minutes a user can have a dozen or so windows open. This can become confusing. Perhaps the UI could run in one window with functional back buttons.

review_title: Great Software for Project Controls and Schedule Analytics Tool
description: Great company to work with, wish we had starting using them a long time ago.
author: Brendan J.
pros: Great people/company to work with, contently reaching out to ensure our success, gather feedback to improve their product and their customer support is very responsive. This tool has greatly improved our schedule quality and help identify potential delays early on so they can be mitigated.
cons: The project setup process requires the XER file, and you cannot upload two schedules with the same data date, however I believe they are working to resolve both issues.

review_title: SmartPM Elevates Company Schedule Performance & Health
description: Our SmartPM experience has been fantastic - integration, support, implementation - everything!
author: John M.
pros: SmartPM has already provided us with actionable reporting on data we currently had but not effectively digesting. The benefits were almost immediate! With SmartPM our project teams are producing hire quality schedules and the reporting is meaningful in a way that we have never seen.
cons: The amount of data being reported can be overwhelming. The real effort in a successful rollout may be in deciding what NOT to report.

author: Paul J.
pros: Visibility of actual progress and trending is a great benefit.
cons: the chart view in the delay analysis is difficult to navigate

review_title: Smart PM Gives Schedulers a Roadmap to Improvement
description: Positive. Great people to work with who are striving to improve construction scheduling.
author: Paul S.
pros: Identifies key areas to ensure schedules are calculating dates correctly, allows drill down to identify root causes and highlights areas of improvement.
cons: Some features are in concept for the enterprise client: 1. Allowing for *.xml format 2. Executive Dashboard On time % using inactive slots. 3. Connections to "Real Time" Database's. vs Imports. 3. Enterprise Pricing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Our overall experience has been very satisfactory. SmartPM has transformed the way we manage schedules and schedule updating.
author: Frank M.
pros: The best aspect of SmartPM is its ability to report on actual progress and future schedule compression by analyzing data and presenting unbiased results.
cons: There really isn't a downside to this software. HPM started with the least amount of slots package, but we have doubled our usage since we started.
